ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., forward, midfielder, defender, goalkeeper) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_team_since" TEXT /* Date the player joined the current team */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager who manages the team */,
  "team_founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_home_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_fanbase" INTEGER /* Estimated number of fans */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Team's official website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "league_founded" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "league_website" TEXT /* League's official website URL */,
  "league_country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "event" INTEGER /* Event number */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the event */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "rank" REAL /* Rank of the player in the event */,
  "overall_rank" REAL /* Overall rank of the player */,
  "bank" INTEGER /* Bank balance of the player's team */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the player */,
  "event_transfers" INTEGER /* Number of transfers made by the player's team in the event */,
  "event_transfers_cost" INTEGER /* Cost of transfers made by the player's team in the event */,
  "points_on_bench" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player's team while on the bench */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the event */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in the event */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets by the player in the event */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player in the event */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team making the transaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the transaction */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "transfer_cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the transaction */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was made */,
  "transfer_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the transfer */,
  "transfer_initiator" INTEGER /* ID of the manager who initiated the transfer */,
  "transfer_status" TEXT /* Status of the transfer (e.g., pending, completed, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transfer_initiator FOREIGN KEY ("transfer_initiator") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the manager */,
  "manager_birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the manager */,
  "manager_experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the manager has */,
  "manager_preferred_position" TEXT /* Preferred position the manager likes to manage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "rank" REAL /* Rank of the team */,
  "overall_rank" REAL /* Overall rank of the team */,
  "rank_sort" REAL /* Rank sort value */,
  "distpw_from_first" INTEGER /* Distance from the top team */,
  "distpw_from_ninth" INTEGER /* Distance from the ninth team */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in rank from the previous event */,
  "rank_date" TEXT /* Date the ranking was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing entry */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference (goals for - goals against) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_standings_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "average_points" REAL /* Average points scored by the team */,
  "transfer_activity" INTEGER /* Transfer activity of the team */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the team */,
  "average_goals" REAL /* Average number of goals scored by the team */,
  "average_assists" REAL /* Average number of assists made by the team */,
  "average_clean_sheets" REAL /* Average number of clean sheets by the team */,
  "average_yellow_cards" REAL /* Average number of yellow cards received by the team */,
  "average_red_cards" REAL /* Average number of red cards received by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, manager, analyst) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
